# Record environment versions for reproducibility.
#
# Fill this after setting up the environment:
# - OS / kernel
# - GPU model(s)
# - NVIDIA driver
# - CUDA toolkit version
# - cuDNN version (if relevant)
# - Python version
# - torch.__version__ / torch.version.cuda
# - transformers.__version__
# - triton.__version__
#
# Suggested commands:
# - nvidia-smi
# - python -c "import torch, transformers, triton; print(torch.__version__, torch.version.cuda, transformers.__version__, triton.__version__)"
